title: EssentialsX XMPP
description: The legacy XMPP integration module for EssentialsX. (requires main module)
body:
### Note: EssentialsX XMPP is a legacy module! It is provided for compatibility with current EssentialsX releases, but does not receive new features.

**EssentialsX XMPP** bridges your server with Jabber/XMPP chat networks.  
Players can chat between XMPP networks and your server, and server admins can also monitor the console and server errors remotely. *If you don't know what XMPP is, you don't need this!*

For more information, see the [Essentials 2 wiki's XMPP guide](https://wiki.mc-ess.net/wiki/XMPP).
